generated_oml:
// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance EnvironmentalTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Captures real-time temperature data from the Physical Twin (PT) environment as part of the BOREALIS project's sensor network. Integrated into BIM model with metadata including tenant IDs and endpoint addresses."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalHumiditySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Captures real-time humidity data from the Physical Twin (PT) environment. Part of the BOREALIS sensor network with metadata extraction for real-time data acquisition via Eclipse Hono."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalHumidityDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Detects occupancy status in building spaces. Integrated into BIM model with device IDs and endpoint addresses for real-time data transmission via Eclipse Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Monitors lighting conditions in building spaces. Part of the BOREALIS project's sensor network for adaptive control policies."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingConditionDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionMeter : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures real-time energy consumption across building systems. Integrated into BIM model with metadata for real-time data acquisition via Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance EnvironmentalTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data transmitted from EnvironmentalTemperatureSensor to the Digital Twin via Eclipse Hono/Ditto for processing."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalTemperatureSensor
]

instance EnvironmentalHumidityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time humidity data transmitted from EnvironmentalHumiditySensor to the Digital Twin via Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalHumiditySensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Occupancy status data transmitted from OccupancySensor to the Digital Twin for real-time monitoring and control policy adjustments."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightingConditionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Lighting condition data transmitted from LightingSensor to the Digital Twin for adaptive lighting optimization via BOREALIS."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingSensor
]

instance EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Energy consumption data transmitted from EnergyConsumptionMeter to the Digital Twin for predictive analytics and optimization."
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionMeter
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BimModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantically enriched Building Information Model (BIM) serving as the static and dynamic data integration backbone for the Digital Twin. Contains device metadata for sensors, actuators, and controllers."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoDittoConfigurator, UnrealEngine5Integration
]

instance RealTimeSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated real-time sensor inputs including temperature, humidity, occupancy, lighting, and energy consumption processed via Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalTemperatureDataTransmitted, EnvironmentalHumidityDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted, LightingConditionDataTransmitted, EnergyConsumptionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ReinforcementLearningEngine, PredictiveAnalyticsEngine
]

instance SimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Digital Twin simulation model used for predictive analytics and 'what-if' scenarios, particularly for energy optimization and adaptive control policies."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Integration, ReinforcementLearningEngine
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D representation model in Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring and simulation of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine5Integration
]

// C11: Enablers
instance HonoDittoConfigurator : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated configurator that extracts device metadata from BIM models and generates runtime interfaces for Eclipse Hono and Ditto. Supports dynamic updates and bidirectional communication."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveLightingOptimizationService, AutomatedCommissioningService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Integration : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables interactive visualization and simulation capabilities in Unreal Engine 5, providing immersive 3D monitoring of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BOREALIS-based reinforcement learning engine for adaptive control policies balancing energy consumption, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects."
    DTDFVocab:enables AdaptiveLightingOptimizationService
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Engine for real-time predictive analytics using sensor data to forecast operational performance and identify inefficiencies."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveMaintenanceService
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineering : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automates transformation of BIM models into runtime artifacts (middleware configurations, service interfaces) via model-to-model and model-to-text transformations."
]

// C6: Services
instance AdaptiveLightingOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Leverages reinforcement learning to balance energy consumption, visual comfort, and non-visual health effects in adaptive lighting systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyEfficiencyInsight, VisualComfortInsight, LightingControlAction
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Uses real-time sensor data to forecast operational performance and identify inefficiencies in building systems."
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalEfficiencyInsight, PredictiveMaintenanceAction
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides immersive 3D monitoring and simulation capabilities using Unreal Engine 5 for building operations."
    DTDFVocab:provides BuildingVisualizationInsight
]

instance AutomatedCommissioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables seamless integration of Building Control System components with minimal manual intervention, specifically for lighting systems via TwinLight."
    DTDFVocab:provides CommissioningStatusInsight, BcsIntegrationAction
]

instance CustomServiceIntegration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for DT engineers to develop and deploy domain-specific services (e.g., energy management, occupancy analytics)."
    DTDFVocab:provides CustomAnalyticsInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance EnergyEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time insights on energy consumption optimization derived from adaptive lighting control policies in the BOREALIS project."
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assessment of visual comfort and non-visual health effects based on lighting conditions and occupancy data."
]

instance LightingControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control signals for lighting systems generated by the Digital Twin to optimize energy use and comfort."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OperationalEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics insights on operational performance and inefficiencies identified through real-time sensor data."
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated maintenance recommendations based on predictive analytics of building system performance."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BuildingVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive 3D visualization of building operations and real-time sensor data in Unreal Engine 5."
]

instance CommissioningStatusInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Status updates on automated commissioning of Building Control System components, particularly lighting systems via TwinLight."
]

instance BcsIntegrationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated integration of Building Control System components with the Digital Twin, enabling bidirectional communication."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance CustomAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Domain-specific analytics insights generated by custom services integrated into the Digital Twin framework."
]

// C2: Acting Components
instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded lighting control system in the Physical Twin, modeled within BIM and configured to receive real-time control signals from the Digital Twin via Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
]

instance HvacController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Building Control System component for HVAC control, integrated with the Digital Twin for bidirectional communication and real-time adjustments."
]

instance BuildingControlSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Centralized Building Control System (BCS) managing lighting, HVAC, and other operational systems, with automated commissioning capabilities via TwinLight."
]

// C1: Environment
instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Cyber-physical representation of buildings within the AECO domain, including operational systems like BCS, lighting, and sensor networks."
    base:contains BuildingInfrastructureComponent
]

instance BuildingInfrastructureComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical building infrastructure including structures, systems, and operational components managed by the Digital Twin."
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT transmits **control signals and commands** back to the Physical Twin (PT) via the same middleware stack (**Eclipse Hono and Ditto**), enabling **bidirectional communication** between the virtual and physical systems. These interactions include **adaptive lighting control policies** (as demonstrated in BOREALIS), **HVAC adjustments**, and other BCS operations. The framework supports **runtime configuration management**, allowing dynamic adjustments to control logic without full redeployment. The **Unreal Engine 5** visualization layer provides an interactive interface for facility managers to monitor and adjust physical systems remotely."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates on a **real-time synchronization** time scale, ensuring continuous bidirectional data exchange between the physical and virtual twins. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the fidelity of this synchronization, though specific synchronization frequencies (e.g., millisecond or second intervals) are not explicitly detailed in the documents. The framework supports **dynamic updates** and **runtime adjustments**, allowing the DT to evolve with operational changes without disrupting synchronization."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  1. **BIM Core**: Central semantic model integrating static and runtime data.
  2. **Middleware Layer**: Eclipse Hono (IoT connectivity) and Ditto (digital twin management) for real-time data exchange.
  3. **Control Layer**: BCS integration for adaptive lighting and HVAC systems.
  4. **Visualization Layer**: Unreal Engine 5 for immersive monitoring.
  5. **Extension Points**: Modular interfaces for integrating custom services (e.g., energy analytics, predictive maintenance).
  The constellation supports **scalable deployment** across building infrastructures, with standardized interfaces ensuring interoperability between components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT covers **multiple life cycle stages** of the building, including:
  - **Design Phase**: Leveraging BIM for static modeling and initial DT configuration.
  - **Construction Phase**: Integrating as-built data and sensor deployments to refine the DT.
  - **Operational Phase**: Enabling real-time monitoring, adaptive control, and predictive maintenance.
  - **Refurbishment/Adaptation**: Supporting dynamic updates to the DT as the physical building evolves (e.g., retrofitting, occupancy changes).
  The DT’s representation aligns with the **as-operated** state of the PT, ensuring continuous synchronization throughout the building’s life cycle."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
    - **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric**: Quantifies the synchronization fidelity between the physical and virtual twins,
    - **Semantic drift mitigation**: Addressed via **real-time data validation** and **automated synchronization** mechanisms,
    - **Model-driven transformations**: Ensure consistency between BIM models and runtime artifacts,
    - **User feedback loops**: Implicit in the **BOREALIS project**, where post-occupancy sensor data iteratively refines control policies.
    The framework prioritizes **semantic coherence** and **runtime adaptability** to maintain high fidelity over the building life cycle."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT employs **Eclipse Hono** for IoT connectivity and **Eclipse Ditto** for digital twin management, enabling **real-time data exchange** via standardized protocols. While specific protocols (e.g., MQTT, AMQP, OPC UA) are not explicitly mentioned, the framework is designed for **interoperability** with heterogeneous data sources. The connection architecture supports **bidirectional communication** between the physical building and its virtual counterpart, ensuring seamless integration with Building Control Systems (BCS)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to **Building Information Modeling (BIM)** as the primary standard for semantic integration and life-cycle management. The framework also leverages **Model-driven Engineering (MDE)** principles, including **metamodels and model transformations**, to ensure consistency and automation. While specific standards like **IFC (Industry Foundation Classes)** or **OASIS CBIS** are not explicitly mentioned, the approach is designed for compatibility with AECO-specific standards and regulatory mandates."
]
